MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: Extended Strenghts and Weaknesses Assessment of DMDD Symptoms and Normal Behavior
MeasurementToolMetadata.Instructions: People differ in their abilities to handle emotions and behave appropriately in several situations. For each item listed below, rate how well you handle emotions and behave compared to other people of the same age. Compared to other people your age, in recent weeks, how well do you most of the time:
MeasurementToolMetadata.Notes: This scale was administered on a 1-7 scale, but the responses were shifted to -3 to +3 for scoring and release.

eswan_dmdd_01a.Description: Avoid or control 'arguing or yelling' at home

eswan_dmdd_01b.Description: Avoid or control 'arguing or yelling' with friends

eswan_dmdd_01c.Description: Avoid or control 'arguing or yelling' at school

eswan_dmdd_02a.Description: Avoid or control 'getting into fights' at home

eswan_dmdd_02b.Description: Avoid or control 'getting into fights' with friends

eswan_dmdd_02c.Description: Avoid or control 'getting into fights' at school

eswan_dmdd_03a.Description: Avoid or control 'taking anger out on objects or throwing things at people' at home

eswan_dmdd_03b.Description: Avoid or control 'taking anger out on objects or throwing things at people' with friends

eswan_dmdd_03c.Description: Avoid or control 'taking anger out on objects or throwing things at people' at school

eswan_dmdd_04a.Description: Control the intensity of anger at home

eswan_dmdd_04b.Description: Control the intensity of anger with friends

eswan_dmdd_04c.Description: Control the intensity of anger at school

eswan_dmdd_05a.Description: Return quickly to baseline mood and behavior when frustrated at home

eswan_dmdd_05b.Description: Return quickly to baseline mood and behavior when frustrated with friends

eswan_dmdd_05c.Description: Return quickly to baseline mood and behavior when frustrated at school

eswan_dmdd_06a.Description: Handle anger when you do not get what you want at home

eswan_dmdd_06b.Description: Handle anger when you do not get what you want with friends

eswan_dmdd_06c.Description: Handle anger when you do not get what you want at school

eswan_dmdd_07a.Description: Handle frustration on a day-to-day basis at home

eswan_dmdd_07b.Description: Handle frustration on a day-to-day basis with friends

eswan_dmdd_07c.Description: Handle frustration on a day-to-day basis at school

eswan_dmdd_08a.Description: Avoid or limit temper tantrums at home

eswan_dmdd_08b.Description: Avoid or limit temper tantrums with friends

eswan_dmdd_08c.Description: Avoid or limit temper tantrums at school

eswan_dmdd_09a.Description: Exhibit a good mood throughout the day, most days of the week at home

eswan_dmdd_09b.Description: Exhibit a good mood throughout the day, most days of the week with friends

eswan_dmdd_09c.Description: Exhibit a good mood throughout the day, most days of the week at school

eswan_dmdd_10a.Description: Compared to other people of the same age, over the past year, how well have you maintained appropriate mood and behavior at home

eswan_dmdd_10b.Description: Compared to other people of the same age, over the past year, how well have you maintained appropriate mood and behavior with friends

eswan_dmdd_10c.Description: Compared to other people of the same age, over the past year, how well have you maintained appropriate mood and behavior at school

eswanDMDD_score_homeOutburst.Description: Home outburst score: sum of the 10 'a' (home) items (eswan_dmdd_01a-10a). n/a if any 'a' item missing.

eswanDMDD_score_friendOutburst.Description: Friend outburst score: sum of the 10 'b' (friends) items (eswan_dmdd_01b-10b). n/a if any 'b' item missing.

eswanDMDD_score_schoolOutburst.Description: School outburst score: sum of the 10 'c' (school) items (eswan_dmdd_01c-10c). n/a if any 'c' item missing.

eswanDMDD_score_total.Description: Overall DMDD score: mean of the home, friend, and school subscale sums, rounded to 1 decimal. n/a if any subscale is missing.
